name: Cyera — Data Security Posture (DSPM)
description: Imports data stores and data-security risks from Cyera (DSPM — Data Security Posture Management; discovers, classifies and protects sensitive data across cloud / SaaS / on-prem). Each Cyera data store becomes an ASSET (with its engine/cloud + sensitivity tags); each data risk/issue becomes a finding attached to its store. Config (worker environment variables): CYERA_API_URL (default https://api.cyera.io), CYERA_CLIENT_ID, CYERA_CLIENT_SECRET (OAuth2 client-credentials → JWT). Offline: pass `file` = a Cyera export JSON, or run with no config for the bundled sample.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.help: Maximum data stores / issues to import

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline: a saved Cyera export JSON to parse instead of the live API
